name: Autonomous disproofs of the sum-product conjecture over $\mathbb R$ with GPT-5.5 Pro
summary: arXiv:2607.20525v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: OpenAI's recent disproof of the Erd\H{o}s unit distance conjecture marked a milestone for AI in mathematics. It also inspired another breakthrough: a...
description: arXiv:2607.20525v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: OpenAI's recent disproof of the Erd\H{o}s unit distance conjecture marked a milestone for AI in mathematics. It also inspired another breakthrough: a human disproof of the Erd\H{o}s--Szemer\'edi sum-product conjecture over $\mathbb R$. In this paper, we present a simple agent built on GPT-5.5 Pro. Using a problem-agnostic, three-stage prompting pi...
author: Yichen Huang
